description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set within a rectangular plot bordered by a low fence. The structure features clean, geometric lines and a flat roof, with a prominent central section and stepped architectural elements. A large swimming pool is situated adjacent to the house, surrounded by a paved area and landscaping. The main entrance is accessible via a short staircase, and the property includes a driveway or walkway leading up to the house. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with large window openings visible on several sides. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor space and a minimalist, contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with geometric lines, a swimming pool, and landscaped surroundings in a fenced plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central structure, and the swimming pool to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the fenced perimeter, and the pool area extending behind the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, paved area, and the back facade of the bungalow with large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway or walkway, fencing, and the stepped roofline.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large side and rear windows
